entry.title: Annotator
entry.description: Select a photo from recent inspections and open the image annotation workspace.

stats.entryPointDescription: This page replaces the old demo photo route and prevents the confusing Photo not found state from the main navigation.

empty.title: No photos yet
empty.description: Create an inspection, import photos, and return here to start annotation.

photoNotFound.title: Photo not found
photoNotFound.description: Import a photo inside an inspection and open it from the photo gallery.

help.editMode: Draw a rectangle on the photo. Created annotations are saved locally in IndexedDB. After creating or selecting an annotation, fill the dynamic form below.
help.readOnlyMode: Read-only mode: you can select an annotation and view its fields, but cannot change geometry, form values, AI review decisions, or delete supervisor markup.

aiReview.title: AI review
aiReview.description: AI suggestions are pending human review. Accept changes source to human. Reject deletes the suggestion.
aiReview.readOnlyDescription: AI suggestions are read-only for the current role.

annotations.title: Annotations
annotations.empty: No annotations for the current filters.

form.title: Dynamic form
form.readOnlyMessage: The current role can view values but cannot change them.
form.emptyEdit: Select an annotation from the list or create a new one to fill the form.
form.emptyReadOnly: Select an annotation from the list to view its fields.

confirm.clearPendingAi: Clear {{count}} pending AI suggestion(s) for this photo?
confirm.rejectAi: Reject this AI suggestion? The annotation will be deleted.

messages.invalidGeometryCreate: Annotation was not saved: invalid geometry. Try drawing it again.
messages.annotationSaved: Annotation saved as {{label}}. Fill the form below.
messages.invalidGeometryUpdate: Annotation geometry update was ignored: invalid geometry.
messages.geometryNotSaved: Annotation geometry update was not saved. Select the annotation and try again.
messages.aiAccepted: AI suggestion accepted. Source changed to human.
